begin
2
    using DifferentialEquations
3
    using Plots
4

71.6 s
SIR! (generic function with 1 method)
xxxxxxxxxx
9
 
1
begin
2
    function SIR!(du,u,p,t)
3
        s,i,r = u
4
        b,k = p
5
        du[1] = -b*s*i
6
        du[2] = b*s*i - k*i
7
        du[3] = k*i
8
    end
9
end
70.2 μs
[36mODEProblem[0m with uType [36mArray{Float64,1}[0m and tType [36mFloat64[0m. In-place: [36mtrue[0m
timespan: (0.0, 140.0)
u0: [7.9e6, 10.0, 0.0]
xxxxxxxxxx
 
1
begin
2
    #initial conditions
3
    p = [0.5/7900000.0,0.33]
4
    u0 = [7900000.0,10.0,0.0]
5
    # u0 = [1.,1.27e-6,0.]
6
    tspan = (0.0,140.0)
7
    ode_prob = ODEProblem(SIR!,u0,tspan,p)
8
end

begin
